pr.title: More dups and a ft link
pr.author: lukechampine

summary: Continuation of PR #2572 that improved matching/linking across fighter Kirby capture-related files, multiple stage files, config splits/symbol metadata, and one item file. The bot report records +4304 matched-code bytes, +2116 linked-code bytes, 18 new matches, 22 unmatched-item improvements, and one unmatched-item regression.

key_files.role: Adjusted .sdata ownership ranges for ftCo_CaptureKirby, ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby, and ftCo_ThrownKirby.
Changed data/sdata/sdata2 symbol metadata, including local @ labels, local data labels, and size/scope updates around fighter and stage data.
Promoted ftCo_CaptureKirby.c and ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby.c from NonMatching to Matching objects.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report 18 new matches

key_files.role: Cleaned includes and literals, adjusted inline helper structure, used PAD_STACK and a padded temporary struct, and matched ftCo_800BD1DC, ftCo_800BD39C, and .sdata according to bot report.
Removed extern literal string declarations for ftCo_804D3BE0/BE8/BF0 after split/symbol metadata changes.
Changed stack padding form in two Yoshi/Kirby special animation functions; both reached 100% in bot report.
Added typed stage data wrapper/string storage and rewrote an OSReport call to reference offsets into stage data; one function reached 100% but another unmatched item regressed per bot report.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match and one regression

key_files.role: Made callback arrays static and added/adjusted stage data/string layout; one function reached 100% and data/rodata improved per bot report.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match and improvements

key_files.role: Stage matching/data adjustment file touched; exact hunk body not fully loaded, but bot report records data improvement and a near-match improvement.
Stage data/matching adjustment file touched; bot report records grGreens_80213524 reached 100% and .data improved.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match and improvement

key_files.role: Stage data/matching adjustment file touched; bot report records grHomeRun_8021C82C reached 100% and .data/.sdata improved.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match and improvements

key_files.role: Stage data/matching adjustment file touched; bot report records grIceMt_801F71E8 reached 100% and .data improved.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match and improvement

key_files.role: Stage matching/data adjustment file touched; bot report records grKongo_801D5340 reached 100% and .data improved substantially.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match and improvement

key_files.role: Stage static header touched alongside grkongo matching/data work.
Stage matching/data adjustment file touched; bot report records grMuteCity_801EFD0C reached 100% plus data and function improvements.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match and improvements

key_files.role: Stage matching/data adjustment file touched; bot report records grOldKongo_8020F52C reached 100% and .data improved.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match and improvement

key_files.role: Stage matching/data adjustment file touched; bot report records grOldPupupu_802108B4 reached 100% and .data plus other functions improved.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match and improvements

key_files.role: Stage matching/data adjustment file touched; bot report records grPura_80211E08 and grPura_80212024 reached 100% and .data improved.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new matches and improvement

key_files.role: Stage matching file with largest source delta; bot report records improvements in grVenom_80206874, grVenom_80205AD4, and .sdata2.
Item file touched by one-line change; exact hunk not loaded in excerpt.

what_changed: configure.py changed ftCo_CaptureKirby.c and ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby.c from NonMatching to Matching.
splits.txt narrowed ftCo_CaptureKirby .sdata to 0x804D3BB0-0x804D3BC8 and added .sdata ranges for ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby and ftCo_ThrownKirby.
symbols.txt converted several address-style/global data symbols to local @ labels and adjusted local label metadata, including ftCo .sdata/.sdata2 and grCastle-related data.

ftCo_CaptureKirby.c removed placeholder/platform/baselib/MetroTRK and unused ftCommon includes, removed TU-local float/double literal definitions, changed helper statement structure, moved ftCommon_InitGrab out of inlineA0, and added PAD_STACK/padded local shaping.
ftCo_ThrownKirby.c removed three extern char* literal declarations now covered by metadata/split changes.
ftKb_SpecialNYs.c changed two stack-padding patterns from FORCE_PAD_STACK plus PAD_STACK(8) to an explicit u8 _pad[8] plus larger PAD_STACK values.
Several stage files added or adjusted data layout constructs, static callback scope, report strings, or related data references to improve stage .data/.rodata/function matching.
The bot report recorded 18 new matches and 22 unmatched-item improvements, with one regression in main/melee/gr/grbigblue grBigBlue_801E6364.
smart_moves: Promoted only the two ftCommon objects whose report evidence reached matching status, while leaving ftCo_ThrownKirby.c as NonMatching.
Moved Kirby capture string/float ownership into split and symbol metadata instead of keeping source-local externs/literal definitions in the C file.
Used local @ symbol labels and split ranges to reflect apparent local data ownership for ftCo_CaptureKirby, ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby, and ftCo_ThrownKirby.
Cleaned obvious generated or no-longer-needed includes in ftCo_CaptureKirby.c while preserving narrow stack-shaping tactics where the diff indicates they affected matching.
Tracked stage data layout with typed wrapper structs in at least grbigblue.c rather than only loose globals, though the exact generality across stage files is not fully visible in the loaded excerpt.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When small data belongs to adjacent fighter TUs, split metadata and symbol scope can be necessary before C source literals/externs can be removed cleanly.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: symbols.txt ftCo_804D3BB0-BF0 converted to @ local labels
diff_excerpt: removed ftCo_CaptureKirby literal definitions and ftCo_ThrownKirby externs

decomp_lessons.lesson: Matching progress may depend on data layout and symbol metadata, not just function bodies; this PR combines source edits with symbols/splits changes and the bot report shows both code and data gains.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report matched code/data and linked code/data deltas

decomp_lessons.lesson: Stack-shaping tactics such as PAD_STACK, explicit padding arrays, and padded temporary structs were used narrowly on functions that the bot report says reached 100%, but the loaded PR does not explain why each padding value is required.
For stage data matching, C source may need to model contiguous stage data plus trailing report strings, and OSReport callsites may reference strings through that data layout.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grbigblue.c grBb_StageData wrapper and OSReport offset arguments
text_corpus: bot report grbigblue function/data changes

naming_conventions.convention: Use local @NNN labels in symbols.txt for local compiler-emitted string/float/double objects when metadata supports local scope, rather than global ftCo_ or lbl_ address names.
Stage data globals in the excerpt retain stage prefixes such as grBb_ and grCs_ with address-style suffixes when semantic names are not otherwise proved.
Helper locals remain short role names such as fp, victim_fp, jobj, pos, vec0, and vec1 in touched fighter code.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed object status from NonMatching to Matching only after bot-reported matches for ftCo_CaptureKirby and ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby.
Used PAD_STACK in ftCo_800BD1DC and ftCo_800BD39C, plus an explicit padded local struct around a Vec3 scale, to influence stack/local layout.
Replaced FORCE_PAD_STACK plus a small PAD_STACK with explicit u8 _pad[8] and larger PAD_STACK calls in two ftKb_SpecialNYs animation functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report entries for ftKb_YsSpecialNCapture2_0_Anim and ftKb_YsSpecialAirN2_1_Anim

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted source expression shape in ftCo_CaptureKirby helpers: removed temporary pos_x/pos_y, reused the pos buffer for victim position, and split float computations for scale.
Used symbols.txt local labels and local data labels such as ...data.0 to model compiler-local data and jump/data objects.
For grbigblue, introduced a struct containing StageData followed by report_format and rewrote OSReport string arguments as pointer offsets into nearby data.

evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report 18 new matches table

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.summary: Reported one regression in unmatched item main/melee/gr/grbigblue grBigBlue_801E6364, with displayed before/after both 94.01%.

notes: PR identity, state, author, changed-file list, and bot report are strong.
The raw diff is truncated in loaded_files and evidence_excerpt, so exact hunks for several stage files and itdraw.c are not visible.
No human review comments or human rationale beyond 'Continuation of #2572' were loaded.
Bot report supports match/improvement/regression claims, but no local build commands, objdiff screenshots, or author explanation are included.
Stack padding and data-layout tactics are visible in the diff, but the slice does not prove the underlying reason for each padding value.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split and symbol metadata can unblock fighter small-data cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2574, ftCo_CaptureKirby/CaptureWaitKirby/ThrownKirby .sdata ranges and local symbol labels were adjusted, allowing ftCo_CaptureKirby local literal definitions and ftCo_ThrownKirby extern literal declarations to be removed while bot-reported .sdata matches were achieved.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Narrow stack-shaping tactics should be tied to specific matched functions
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2574 used PAD_STACK, explicit padding arrays, and padded temporary structs in functions that the bot report lists as reaching 100%, but the PR slice does not provide independent rationale for the padding values.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Stage matching may require modeling contiguous data plus report strings
accepted_candidate_records.text: The grbigblue excerpt models StageData followed by a report_format string in a wrapper struct and rewrites OSReport to use offsets into nearby data; the bot report records a new grBigBlue_801E59F8 match and broader .data improvement, with one separate grbigblue unmatched-item regression noted.

source_update_candidates.title: ftCo_CaptureKirby and ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby promoted to Matching in PR #2574
source_update_candidates.text: configure.py changed melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_CaptureKirby.c and melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby.c from NonMatching to Matching; bot report lists ftCo_CaptureKirby function/.sdata matches and ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby .sdata match.
source_update_candidates.reason: May be useful as historical path status evidence, but should be curated against current source before becoming a path fact.

source_update_candidates.title: Kirby capture .sdata split ownership adjusted in PR #2574
source_update_candidates.text: splits.txt assigned ftCo_CaptureKirby .sdata 0x804D3BB0-0x804D3BC8, ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby .sdata 0x804D3BC8-0x804D3BE0, and ftCo_ThrownKirby .sdata 0x804D3BE0-0x804D3BF8.
source_update_candidates.reason: Concrete split metadata change, but current splits should outrank historical PR evidence.

source_update_candidates.title: Require rationale for retained PAD_STACK and padded local structs
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2574 shows stack padding and padded temporary structs used in matched fighter functions, but the loaded evidence does not explain why the exact padding values are necessary. Curator may consider strengthening guidance that retained stack-shaping tactics should cite the narrow function and verifier evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with existing standards but is not a new accepted rule from the PR alone.

source_update_candidates.title: Review stage data wrapper/report-string layout patterns from PR #2574
source_update_candidates.text: The grbigblue excerpt adds a StageData wrapper with trailing report_format and OSReport pointer-offset references; several other stage files show data improvements in the bot report. This may indicate reusable stage data layout patterns worth documenting after inspecting full diffs/current source.
source_update_candidates.reason: Loaded diff is truncated for many stage files; needs curator review before any data-sheet update.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all stage files changed in the same way; most stage hunks are not loaded.
Do not treat the grbigblue OSReport pointer-offset pattern as a global preferred style without current-source and objdiff context.
Do not promote exact stack padding values as reusable rules; the PR slice shows their use but not the rationale.
Do not claim there was human review approval rationale; no review comments were present in the loaded evidence.
Do not claim a clean regression-free result; the bot report lists one grbigblue unmatched-item regression.
